phase: Phase PKG: No-prerequisite packaging (owner-decision card Option B)
task: Phase PKG Task 2 (Option B) - offline vendored-wheels venv bootstrap
summary: Authored Option B of the packaging card: a fully-offline vendored-wheels install of the numpy/pandas/scipy COMPUTE engine. packaging/offline_bootstrap.py (stdlib) creates a venv and installs with pip --no-index --find-links wheelhouse -r requirements-engine-lock.txt (no network, no global install); scripts/vendor_wheels.py is the single networked harvest step (pip download), run once by an owner/CI. No wheels are vendored in-repo. Complements Option A (frozen binary) and Option C (run from source); forecloses neither.
networked_step: scripts/vendor_wheels.py (pip download --only-binary :all:) - owner/CI run, NOT in dev sandbox
standard_references: pip user guide - --no-index / --find-links offline installs; pip download for wheelhouse harvesting
SOA ASOP 56 s.3.4-3.6 - model implementation reproducibility (pinning the numerical stack)
